message: 🌱 Add opentofu: Enable Variables in backend config block mission (#707)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "opentofu-388-enable-variables-in-backend-config-block",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "opentofu: Enable Variables in backend config block",
+    "description": "Enable Variables in backend config block. Requested by 61+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current opentofu deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your opentofu version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentofu\nhelm list -n opentofu 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working opentofu installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review opentofu configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant opentofu configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentofu\nkubectl get configmap -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=opentofu\n```\n### OpenTF Version\n\n```shell\nOpenTF v1.6.0-dev\non darwin_amd64\n```\n\n### Use Cases\n\nCurrently, if I have OpenTF configuration, I would like to use a different backend configuration when I run OpenTF for different stages, for example prod and dev AWS"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Enable Variables in backend config block",
+        "description": "Implements RFC #1042 [Static Evaluation](https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/blob/main/rfc/20240513-static-evaluation.md)\r\r\n\nThis is a work in progress that builds on top of my prototyping over the past 6 months.\n\nNote: Input variable handing is a bit wonky as it's spread across a bunch of\n```yaml\nterraform {\n  backend \"s3\" {\n    bucket  = \"terraform-state-bucket\"\n    key     = \"terraform.tfstate\"\n    region  = \"us-east-1\"\n    encrypt = true\n    access_key = \"{{ AWS_S3_BACKEND_ACCESS_KEY }}\"\n    secret_key = \"{{ AWS_S3_BACKEND_SECRET_KEY }}\"\n  }\n}\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n opentofu -l app.kubernetes.io/name=opentofu\nkubectl get events -n opentofu --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Enable Variables in backend config block\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Implements RFC #1042 [Static Evaluation](https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/blob/main/rfc/20240513-static-evaluation.md)\r\r\n\nThis is a work in progress that builds on top of my prototyping over the past 6 months.\n\nNote: Input variable handing is a bit wonky as it's spread across a bunch of different packages.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "terraform {\n  backend \"s3\" {\n    bucket  = \"terraform-state-bucket\"\n    key     = \"terraform.tfstate\"\n    region  = \"us-east-1\"\n    encrypt = true\n    access_key = \"{{ AWS_S3_BACKEND_ACCESS_KEY }}\"\n    secret_key = \"{{ AWS_S3_BACKEND_SECRET_KEY }}\"\n  }\n}",
+        "terraform {\n  backend \"s3\" {\n    bucket  = \"terraform-state-bucket\"\n    key     = \"terraform.tfstate\"\n    region  = \"us-east-1\"\n    encrypt = true\n    access_key = \"${var.access_key}\"\n    secret_key = \"${var.secret_key}\"\n  }\n}"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "opentofu",
+      "sandbox",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "opentofu"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "sandbox",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/issues/388",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/opentofu/opentofu/pull/1718"
+    },
+    "reactions": 61,
+    "comments": 4,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with opentofu installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-11T06:41:55.233Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
